filesCreated.purpose: Block metadata — takt/team-member-cpt, inserter:false, multiple:false, attributes:{}
Editor component — visual preview mirroring card-team-member.php. Uses featured image, RichText for first_name/last_name/excerpt, read-only department badge, static CTA.

Sidebar PluginDocumentSettingPanel with TextControl for first_name, last_name and TextareaControl for excerpt (role). No photo field — built-in Featured Image panel (featured-image.tsx) already handles team_member.

changes: Added template => [['takt/team-member-cpt']] to post type registration
Added template_lock => 'all' to post type registration
Changed photo_id from get_post_meta(ID, 'photo', true) to get_post_thumbnail_id(ID) — per user correction that photo meta is replaced by featured image

userCorrectionApplied.description: Photo meta field replaced by post thumbnail (featured image)
actions: Did NOT register a photo meta field
Did NOT add photo MediaUploadPanel to sidebar (featured-image.tsx already handles team_member post type)
Added 'thumbnail' to supports array in team_member.php
Block body displays featured image via useSelect(coreEditorStore).getEditedPostAttribute('featured_media') + coreStore.getMedia()
Updated card-team-member.php to use get_post_thumbnail_id() instead of photo meta

blockTypePatterns.postTypeGuard: if (postType !== 'team_member') return null — in both block and sidebar panel
blockTypePatterns.metaReadWrite: useSelect for meta/excerpt reading, editPost({meta:{...}}) for first_name/last_name, editPost({excerpt}) for role
blockTypePatterns.autoTitleSync: useEffect syncs title to first_name + last_name whenever either changes
blockTypePatterns.featuredImage: useSelect reads featured_media ID, coreStore.getMedia() fetches URL for display in block body
blockTypePatterns.taxonomyFetch: useSelect + coreStore fetches department terms read-only for badge display
blockTypePatterns.dualLocationControls: first_name/last_name/excerpt editable in both block body (RichText) and sidebar panel (TextControl/TextareaControl)

buildStatus.note: Pre-existing lint errors in MainWrapper/index.tsx, FullWidthMedia/FullWidthMedia.tsx, and TestimonialsCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel.tsx are not related to this block.

syncStatus.note: CPT block has no PHP render file. TSX/PHP sync check passes (skipped for CPT blocks per addendum).
